reproducibility.detail: Clean Linux and Windows gates passed for immutable commit 8e61c56.

static_correctness.detail: Lint, typecheck, build, ownership tests, and default release gate pass.

public_contracts.detail: The structured map remains canonical and shares filters, IDs, selection, precision, source, and viewport state with the optional visualization.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Only published public-precision geometry is rendered; country-only records are not assigned invented points.

browser_journeys.detail: Local and clean-checkout browser gates cover activation, selection, focus, provider failure, offline recovery, reduced motion, viewport state, and mobile reflow.
evidence: Linux and Windows browser smoke PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: The visualization and map-free journey pass automated WCAG A and AA checks.

visual_regression.detail: Named bilingual semantic visual review is not recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: Route First Load JS is 111 kB. Largest map asset is 117078 gzip bytes below the 180 KiB limit; aggregate activation assets are 366180 gzip bytes.

staging.detail: The immutable deployment is reachable and initially passed 7/7, but later runs had random connection closures and intermittent 503 responses.

human_signoff.detail: Product-owner, semantic visual, and real iOS Safari evidence are not recorded.

release_decision.detail: Implementation and clean CI pass, but release remains blocked by unstable Staging and incomplete human and iOS evidence.
